name: LayoutAttributes
summary: The LayoutAttributes class contains attributes for controlling the drawing layout.

constructors.name: LayoutAttributes()
constructors.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This constructor is obsolete and may be removed in the future. Instead, use the constructor which takes a Drawing Type.", false)] public LayoutAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new layout attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: LayoutAttributes(String)
constructors.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This constructor is obsolete and may be removed in the future. Instead, use the constructor which takes a Drawing Type.", false)] public LayoutAttributes(string AttributeFile)
constructors.summary: Creates a new layout attributes instance that loads drawing layout attributes from the specified attribute file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The name of the drawing attribute file. E.g. "standard".

constructors.name: LayoutAttributes(Drawing)
constructors.summary: Creates a new layout attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

params.name: Drawing
params.doc: The type of drawing to load layout attributes for.

constructors.name: LayoutAttributes(String, Drawing)
constructors.summary: Creates a new layout attributes instance that loads drawing layout attributes from the specified attribute file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The name of the drawing attribute file. E.g. "standard".

params.name: Drawing
params.doc: The type of drawing to load layout attributes for.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads drawing layout attributes from the specified attribute file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The name of the drawing attribute file. E.g. "standard".

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: AutoSizeOptions
properties.summary: Gets or sets the auto size options that control the drawing sheet size. Setting this property will change the SizeDefinitionMode to AutoSize.

properties.name: ListHiddenObjectsInTemplates
properties.summary: Gets or sets the property for controlling whether to list hidden objects in templates.

properties.name: SheetSize
properties.summary: Gets or sets the sheet size. Setting this property will change the SizeDefinitionMode to SpecifiedSize.

properties.name: SizeDefinitionMode
properties.summary: Gets or sets the size definition mode.
